title: arrayed module instantiation with unpacked arrays: internal error: V3Slice.cpp:277: ArraySel dtyping failed when resolving slice

features.name: module_instantiation_unpacked_array_implicit_ports
features.description: Code should include module instantiation with unpacked array port dimensions and implicit .* port connections
features.snippet: module top(); parameter N = 4; logic o [N-1:0]; logic i; sub sub [N-1:0] (.*); endmodule module sub(input logic i, output logic o); assign o = i; endmodule
